headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Futures Drop As Iran Flags Ceasefire Violation, Trump Says Arms 'Will Remain In Place'—Arrive AI, Costco In Focus (UPDATED)
summary:
(Editor’s note: The future prices of benchmark tracking ETFs, the lede, the economic data and the headline were updated in the story.)



U.S. stocks fell on Thursday, following Wednesday’s sharp rebound. Futures of the major benchmark indices were lower after Iran accused Washington of violating the ceasefire.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Initiates Coverage On Digital Realty Trust with Overweight Rating, Announces Price Target of $211
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Brett Knoblauch   initiates coverage on Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Overweight rating and announces Price Target of $211.

headline: Digital Realty Targets Nearly S$7 Billion Investment to Strengthen Singapore as Asia Pacific AI Hub
summary: Planned data center expansion, workforce growth, and new innovation capabilities position Singapore as a critical base for production-scale AISINGAPORE, April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the world's largest cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, today announced it is targeting nearly S$7 billion of total investment in Singapore, reinforcing the market's critical role as an AI infrastructure hub for Asia Pacific, with more than S$4.3 billion planned for new
